writeFlowsCovered: Concurrent workspace user create with duplicate email
Concurrent workspace user email update to the same email
Concurrent access role create with duplicate id
Access role update DB unique/not-found race mapping
expected: Concurrent duplicate user email creates return one success and one stable 409 user_email_taken, with exactly one persisted email.
Concurrent duplicate user email updates return one success and one stable 409 user_email_taken, with exactly one persisted target email.
Concurrent duplicate access role id creates return one success and one stable 409 access_role_id_taken, with exactly one persisted role.
Access role DB unique conflicts are mapped to the same public 409 contract as route pre-checks; update-after-delete race maps to 404 access_role_not_found instead of 500.
redEvidence: Before the fix, cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t \"concurrent workspace user creates\"" failed: expected [201,409], received [201,500].
fixApplied: workspaceUserRoutes now maps Postgres 23505 on tenant_users_tenant_id_id_uidx, tenant_users_tenant_id_email_uidx and user_credentials_email_uidx to user_id_taken/user_email_taken 409 responses around transactional create/update.
accessRoleRoutes now maps Postgres 23505 on access_profiles_pkey/access_profiles_tenant_id_id_uidx to access_role_id_taken and future access_profiles_tenant_id_name_uidx to access_role_name_taken.
accessRoleRoutes now maps update-after-precheck missing-row races to 404 access_role_not_found.
greenEvidence: cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t \"concurrent workspace user creates\"" -> 1 selected test passed, 23 skipped.

cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t \"concurrent workspace user updates\"" -> 1 selected test passed, 24 skipped.

cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t \"concurrent\"" -> 4 selected tests passed, 22 skipped.
limitations: This closes only the admin user/access-role duplicate-conflict slice of RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY.

Access role name race is still not fully DB-enforced because access_profiles currently has no unique index on (tenant_id, name); the route mapper is ready for access_profiles_tenant_id_name_uidx, but schema/migration is a separate follow-up if product requires strict concurrent name uniqueness.
Communication channel rename races, auth reset concurrent confirm/email-provider happy path, CRM/contact remaining races, and the full write-flow matrix remain separate slices.
regressionRisk: Low-to-medium. The change only maps DB conflict errors to existing public 409/404 contracts, but it affects admin write error handling paths.
